Management commands for AI chat runtime data
ai_skill_list.py: List discovered AI skills from module registry and contract files
ai_skill_reload.py: Clear current-process AI skill catalog cache and rediscover skills
ai_skill_validate.py: Validate AI skill catalog and runtime SKILL.md files
cleanup_ai_window_context.py: Delete expired AI window context snapshots
cleanup_expired_ai_actions.py: Mark expired pending AI actions as expired
migrate_legacy_chat_db.py: Copy legacy chat tables from main_vault.sqlite3 to data/db/chat.sqlite3
